task_scores.task_title: Pre-flight automation — PYTHONPATH check for missing dependencies
task_scores.ships_wrong_risk: If the import path or module layout changes, the pre-flight may pass while runtime still fails.
task_scores.reasoning: Fail-fast on missing deps reduces debug time and aligns with data integrity.

task_scores.task_title: Step 2.1 — Define session_ids and expected_count at start of main()
task_scores.ships_wrong_risk: If the skip path runs before session_ids is populated, NameError returns.
task_scores.reasoning: Removes core undefined variable bug that would block the pipeline.

task_scores.task_title: Step 3.2 — Guard on sc null when fetchScore fails
task_scores.ships_wrong_risk: If guard is wrong, trend shows 0 instead of insufficient_data and misleads operators.
task_scores.higher_leverage_alternative: Consider failing loudly (error UI) instead of silent fallback when sc is null.
task_scores.reasoning: Prevents silent wrong data in the last slot.

task_scores.task_title: Step 1.2 — Plan file path resolution (taskspace → .cursor/issues → docs/)
task_scores.ships_wrong_risk: Resolution order may conflict if multiple plan files exist in different locations.
task_scores.higher_leverage_alternative: Single canonical path (e.g. docs/) to avoid resolution ambiguity.
task_scores.reasoning: Unblocks script execution but adds path complexity.

task_scores.task_title: Step 4.3 — Integration test for welder report sc.total in last slot
task_scores.ships_wrong_risk: Manual fallback may drift from actual integration behavior over time.
task_scores.higher_leverage_alternative: Automated E2E test for welder report caller; avoid manual-only verification.
task_scores.reasoning: Validates critical data path but depends on E2E setup.

critical_issues: T4 path resolution — Multiple plan locations may lead to different scripts loading different plans.
T5 — Manual fallback for integration test is a weak guarantee; regression risk remains if E2E is not automated.
minor_issues: Orphan sessions (Step 2.2) are documented but no explicit cleanup or constraint is defined.
Tuning guide grep check in Step 1.1 does not specify which params or files to search.
suggestions: Canonicalize plan location to a single path (e.g. docs/plans/) and reference it consistently.
Add a unit test that mocks fetchScore returning null and asserts insufficient_data or no trend render.
Document in risk heatmap the manual fallback drift risk for Step 4.3.
dependency_order: T1 (pre-flight) first — all other tasks assume env works. T4 (path resolution) before T2 — T2's main() flow depends on plan being loadable. T2 before T3 — T3 consumes session data. T5 can run after T3.
premortem_top_risk: Manual Step 4.3 verification decays: nobody re-runs it when the welder report caller changes.
goal_alignment_notes: The five tasks remove runtime failures (undefined vars, null handling) and increase determinism; together they advance the mock welders / skill arcs goal by making the pipeline reliable and verifiable.
